title: Bahrain condemns Iranian drone attacks on its territory

snapshot.title: Bahrain condemns Iranian drone attacks on its territory
snapshot.description: Bahrain condemned what ​it said were Iranian drone attacks on its territory ‌on Saturday, ‌the ​state news ‌agency ⁠reported, ​saying it ⁠reserved the full right to defend its ⁠sovereignty and ‌security. Iran ‌said ​earlier ‌it ‌had carried out strikes against targets linked ‌to US forces in the ⁠region, ⁠without identifying the targets or saying where they were located.
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Bahrain condemns Iranian drone attacks on its territory | Arab News
